source: Cannot delete tag — {0} entries use it.
translation: Tegni oʻchirib boʻlmaydi — {0} ta yozuv undan foydalanmoqda.

source: Do you want to sync all unsynced time entries to ERPNext now?
translation: Barcha sinxronlanmagan vaqt yozuvlarini hozir ERPNext bilan sinxronlashni xohlaysizmi?

source: Entries older than {0} days are locked. Contact your administrator.
translation: {0} kundan eski yozuvlar qulflangan. Administratoringiz bilan bogʻlaning.

source: ERPNext is not installed on this site.
ERPNext is reachable and Timesheet access is confirmed.
translation: ERPNext mavjud va vaqt jadvali ruxsati tasdiqlangan.

source: ERPNext Timesheet {0} for {1} is submitted — re-sync blocked.
translation: ERPNext vaqt jadvali {0} ({1} uchun) topshirilgan — qayta sinxronlash bloklangan.

source: ERPNext Timesheet is submitted — re-sync blocked
translation: ERPNext vaqt jadvali topshirilgan — qayta sinxronlash bloklangan

source: Download all your time entries as CSV.
translation: Barcha vaqt yozuvlaringizni CSV sifatida yuklab oling.
Teg qayta nomlandi. {0} ta yozuv yangilandi.
Teglar birlashtirildi. {0} ta yozuv qayta teglandi.

source: Warning: This entry is more than 7 days old.
Press H or Esc to close
translation: Yopish uchun H yoki Esc bosing

source: Work in focused sessions with timed breaks.
translation: Vaqtlangan tanaffuslar bilan fokus seanslarda ishlang.
